html:
Exclusive to:

The Sea Wall is a type of wall introduced in the Shipwrecked DLC. They require a Science Machine to prototype, and are crafted with two pieces of Limestone and 4 Seaweed, resulting in 6 wall segments. They can only be placed on the Ocean. When hammered, Sea Walls will drop one or two pieces of Coral depending on their health. They can not be repaired with Limestone or Coral.

Trivia

  • Sea Walls were added to the Shipwrecked DLC more than a year after its official completion in the Home Sea Home update, after being tested in a beta branch for several months.

Gallery

  • Sea Wall as seen in the poster for the Home Sea Home update.

The Sea Wall is a type of wall introduced in the Shipwrecked DLC. They require a Science Machine to prototype, and are crafted with two pieces of Limestone and 4 Seaweed, resulting in 6 wall segments. They can only be placed on the Ocean. When hammered, Sea Walls will drop one or two pieces of Coral depending on their health. They can not be repaired with Limestone or Coral.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
Sea Walls were added to the Shipwrecked DLC more than a year after its official completion in the Home Sea Home update, after being tested in a beta branch for several months.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Tường Biển là một loại tường được giới thiệu trong DLC ​​Shipwrecked. Chúng yêu cầu Máy Khoa học để tạo nguyên mẫu và được chế tạo bằng hai mảnh Đá vôi và 4 Rong biển, tạo thành 6 đoạn tường. Chúng chỉ có thể được đặt trên Đại dương. Khi đập, Tường Biển sẽ rơi ra một hoặc hai mảnh San Hô tùy theo lượng máu của chúng. Chúng không thể được sửa chữa bằng Đá vôi hoặc San hô.

The '''Sea Wall''' is a type of wall introduced in the ''Shipwrecked'' DLC. They require a [[Science Machine]] to prototype, and are crafted with two pieces of [[Limestone]] and 4 [[Seaweed]], resulting in 6 wall segments. They can only be placed on the [[Ocean]]. When hammered, Sea Walls will drop one or two pieces of [[Coral]] depending on their health. They can not be repaired with Limestone or Coral.

=={{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia==
*Sea Walls were added to the ''Shipwrecked'' DLC more than a year after its official completion in the ''[[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked#November 21st, 2017 - Home Sea Home Update|Home Sea Home]]'' update, after being tested in a beta branch for several months.
